## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, API keys, or private PII PDFs in the diff
- [ ] `python scripts/install_smoke.py` passes (or note why N/A)
- [ ] Targeted tests for this change (e.g. `pytest tests/… -q`) or docs-only N/A
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour / CLI / MCP surface changed
- [ ] Detector threshold changes note impact on negative controls / fixtures when relevant
